verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.10.0/R5 Phase 1 Block E run for Milwaukee Brewers @ St. Louis Cardinals completed the full lifecycle: contest 21 was created and verified; moneyline, spread, and total speculations 52/53/51 were manually seeded and fully filled with zero residual seed exposure; candidates --allowlist-only and dry-run passed with strict contest allowlist [21] and seedSpeculations=false; the market maker posted six tiny live quotes across moneyline, spread, and total; a controlled live spread quote was filled; the five remaining visible quotes were soft-cancelled on clean shutdown; final open commitments were zero; official final score Milwaukee Brewers 4 / St. Louis Cardinals 3 was verified; contest 21 was scored through R5/CRE; target speculations were settled, winning controlled positions were claimed, and final target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after manual remediation claims. Caveats: startup own-state stream-health hold cleared before posting/fill, the controlled fill preview warned expires-soon because quote expiry was short, initial manual moneyline/spread operator commands required no-write shell-quoting retries, and the no-agent postgame watcher surfaced residual claimables before manual remediation completed zero-state.

capabilities.notes: MIL @ STL contest 21 and specs 52/53/51 passed target identity, allowlist, odds, and runway gates.
SDK/CLI v0.10.0, MM head 6f3ccc1, installed MM SDK v0.9.0, and required ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public balances were sufficient and allowances were bounded.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approvals were created.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned quote-ready rows for contest 21 and all three seeded markets; dry run stayed target-scoped with seedSpeculations=false and wouldSubmitCount=6.
Tiny live moneyline, spread, and total commitments posted under strict contest allowlist [21], seedSpeculations=false.
A controlled taker filled exactly one live MM spread quote for contest 21; preview carried an expires-soon warning.
Telemetry captured eventCounts.fill=1 with canonicalFillObserved=true; startup stream-health hold entered with zero exposure and cleared before posting/fill; bad own-state counters stayed zero.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame remediation, and no orphan MM process remained.
Block E brief did not require a separate scratch cold-start probe; zero-open and no-orphan shutdown proofs were captured.
Official final score was verified and contest 21 scored via R5/CRE using CLI v0.10.0 score --wait.
Moneyline, spread, and total speculations 52/53/51 were explicitly settled after scoring.
Winning controlled positions were claimed; manual remediation claims completed final target zero-state.
Tiny manual/live risk plus protocol fees stayed within the Phase 1 Block E 10 USDC target budget and below the 15 USDC ask threshold.
